The character is not at the yellow L-shape's position. I need to move DOWN to reach the yellow L-shape's row.

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

The yellow L-shape is at rows 45-53, cols 51-59.
I need to move the character DOWN to reach the yellow L-shape's row. From row 26 to row 45 is 19 steps.

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
